sources.title: Decoding of the neural representation of the visual RGB color model
sources.finding: 93.7% accuracy decoding R/G/B from EEG. Sequential timing: R at 190ms, G at 215ms, B at 238ms post-stimulus.
sources.file: PeerJ Decoding of the neural representation of the visual RGB color model.pdf

sources.title: 3D X-ray CT and fluid dynamics simulation of canine nasal cavity airflow
sources.finding: Three simultaneous airflow routes in dog nasal cavity: fast (gas exchange), slow (humidification), turbulent (odor collection via turbinates).

sources.title: Wild hummingbirds discriminate nonspectral colors
sources.journal: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences
sources.finding: Field experiments confirmed hummingbirds discriminate UV+visible nonspectral colors invisible to trichromats. Tetrahedral color space geometry.

sources.title: Visible light communication using RGB wavelength division multiplexing
sources.finding: 60 Gbps over 500m fiber using three RGB laser diodes (650nm, 530nm, 450nm) with polarization multiplexing. Three orthogonal wavelengths = independent channels.

sources.title: VRGB: Visual RGB Colorspace as Semantic Coordinate System
sources.finding: 16.7M hex positions as semantic vectors. Euclidean distance as conceptual relatedness. Compression steering via coordinate geometry.
